trail.name: Wicklow Way
facilities: Hostel on the route: Knockree Hostel Lackan House, Lackandarragh, Enniskerry, Co. Wicklow, A98 R2Y9. Knockree Hostel is a restored 18th-century farmhouse set on a 64-acre site of natural conservation providing un-spoilt views of the Glencree Valley. With the Wicklow Way hiking trail passing directly through the grounds, it is ideal for hillwalkers, backpackers, families, youth groups and outdoor enthusiasts. Enquiries: liz@anoige.ie General enquiries: info@anoige.ie. www.anoige.ie
